mapper.sql: transfer_id AS transferId, vip_benefit_id AS vipBenefitId, from_user_id AS fromUserId, to_user_id AS toUserId, from_store_id AS fromStoreId, to_store_id AS toStoreId, service_fee AS serviceFee, service_fee_order_no AS serviceFeeOrderNo, transaction_number AS transactionNumber, status, audit_user_id AS auditUserId, audit_time AS auditTime, audit_remark AS auditRemark, confirm_deadline AS confirmDeadline, refund_status AS refundStatus, created_date AS createdDate, effect_time AS effectTime
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vip_benefit_transfer
vip_benefit_id, from_user_id, to_user_id, from_store_id, to_store_id, service_fee, service_fee_order_no, status, refund_status,
#{vipBenefitId}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{fromStoreId}, #{toStoreId}, #{serviceFee}, #{serviceFeeOrderNo}, #{status}, #{refundStatus},
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vip_benefit_transfer WHERE vip_benefit_id = #{vipBenefitId} AND ( status IN (20, 40) OR (status = 10 AND created_date > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)) )
SELECT FROM vip_benefit_transfer WHERE service_fee_order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
